message:
fix(clippy): resolve pre-existing lint debt in 5 non-raptorq files

Fix clone_on_copy, redundant_clone, uninlined_format_args, useless_format,
and redundant_field_names warnings in error.rs, quic_core/mod.rs,
semaphore.rs, web/extract.rs, and web/response.rs.

These pre-existing lints were blocking multiple agents from passing
cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings during their bead work.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
